title: Fix 'Securing Connection' hang — correct InternetIdentityProvider URL and AuthGuard initialization guard

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/main.tsx` (or wherever `InternetIdentityProvider` is instantiated), ensure the `identityProvider` prop is set to the correct URL for the current environment: `http://rdmx6-jaaaa-aaaaa-aaadq-cai.localhost:4943` when running locally against dfx, and `https://identity.ic0.app` for production. Use `process.env.NODE_ENV`, `import.meta.env.DEV`, or the `DFX_NETWORK` environment variable to select the correct URL at build time. Remove any hardcoded, unreachable, or malformed identity provider URL that could cause the Internet Identity iframe to hang on 'Securing Connection'.
acceptanceCriteria: The `InternetIdentityProvider` receives the correct `identityProvider` URL for the active environment (local vs. production).
No hardcoded unreachable URL is present in the provider configuration.
The Internet Identity iframe loads without hanging on 'Securing Connection' in both local and production environments.
The environment selection logic uses a reliable build-time or runtime flag (e.g., `import.meta.env.DEV` or `DFX_NETWORK`).

requirements.text: Audit `frontend/src/App.tsx` — specifically the `AuthGuard` component — and ensure it does not make any routing decision (redirect to `/login` or render protected content) while `isInitializing` is `true`. While `isInitializing` is `true`, render only the full-page military-themed loading spinner. Only after `isInitializing` has definitively settled to `false` may the guard redirect unauthenticated users to `/login` or render protected routes.
acceptanceCriteria: `AuthGuard` renders the full-page military-themed loading spinner (matte black background, gold/green accents) when `isInitializing === true`.
No redirect to `/login` occurs while `isInitializing` is `true`.
After `isInitializing` settles to `false`, unauthenticated users are redirected to `/login` and authenticated users see their protected content.
The 'Securing Connection' screen does not appear indefinitely after this fix.

requirements.text: Audit `frontend/src/hooks/useActorReady.ts` and enforce that `isActorReady` is `true` only when all three conditions are met in order: (a) `isInitializing` from `useInternetIdentity` is `false`, (b) the principal is non-anonymous (not equal to `Principal.anonymous()`), and (c) the actor instance returned by `useActor` is non-null. If the hook currently sets `isActorReady` to `true` before `isInitializing` has settled, or before the principal is confirmed non-anonymous, or before the actor is non-null, rewrite it to enforce all three conditions strictly.
acceptanceCriteria: `isActorReady` returns `false` when the actor instance is `null` or `undefined`.
`isActorReady` returns `true` only after all three conditions are simultaneously satisfied.
No premature `true` value causes dependent queries to fire before the identity is resolved.

constraints: Do not modify any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths: `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`, `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, `frontend/src/main.tsx`, `frontend/src/components/ui`.
Do not change any backend logic or data structures.
Do not alter the military visual theme or any existing UI layout.
nonGoals: Changing the authentication mechanism away from Internet Identity.
Altering sidebar links or default link URLs.
